children.heading: Assistant Secretary
children.label: 1 Assistant Secretary
children.text: The term “Assistant Secretary” means the Assistant Secretary for the Countering Weapons of Mass Destruction Office.

children.heading: Intelligence community
children.label: 2 Intelligence community
children.text: The term “intelligence community” has the meaning given such term in .section 3003(4) of title 50

children.heading: Office
children.label: 3 Office
children.text: The term “Office” means the Countering Weapons of Mass Destruction Office established under .section 591(a) of this title

children.heading: Weapon of mass destruction
children.label: 4 Weapon of mass destruction
children.text: The term “weapon of mass destruction” has the meaning given the term in .section 1801 of title 50
